title: Farmer's Knives
description: Adds knives to Farmer's Delight for many other mods
body:
![farmers-knives](https://i.postimg.cc/T1cDttyv/farmers-knives-banner.png)

 

Adds knives to Farmer's Delight for many modded materials!

 

Supported List:

[Adabranium](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/adabranium)

Vibranium

Adamantium

Nether Brick

 

[Additional Additions](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/additional-additions)

Rose Gold

Gilded Netherite

 

[Advanced Netherite](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/advanced-netherite-fabric)

Netherite-Iron

Netherite-Gold

Netherite-Emerald

Netherite-Diamond

 

[Aphid Additions](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aphid-additions)

Chitin

 

[BetterEnd](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/betterend)

Thallasium

Terminite

Aeternium

 

[BetterNether](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/betternether)

Cincinnasite

Cincinnasite-Diamond

Nether Ruby

 

[Botania](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/botania-fabric)

Manasteel

Elementium

Terrasteel

 

[Conjuring](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/conjuring)

Soul Alloy

 

[Copper Age Backport](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/copper-age-backport)

Copper

 

[Create Stuff and Additions](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-stuff-additions)

Brass
Zinc

 

[Deeper and Darker](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/deeperdarker)

Warden

 

[Dragon Loot](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dragonloot)

Dragon

 

[Easy Emerald Tools & More](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/simple-emerald-tools-fabric)

Emerald

Ruby

Amethyst

Steel

Obsidian

Copper

 

End Reborn

Remnant

Featherzeal

 

[Enderite Mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/enderite-mod-for-fabric)

Enderite

 

[Gobber](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gobber-fabric)

Gobber

Nether Gobber

End Gobber

 

[Mythic Metals](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mythicmetals)

Adamantite

Aquarium

Banglum

Bronze

Carmot

Celestium

Copper

Durasteel

Hallowed

Kyber

Legendary Banglum

Metallurgium

Mythril

Orichalcum

Osmium

Palladium

Prometheum

Quadrillum

Runite

Star Platinum

Steel

Stormyx

Tidesinger

 

[Oh The Biomes You'll Go](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/oh-the-biomes-youll-go-fabric)

Pendorite

 

Progression Reborn

Copper

Rose

 

[The Twilight Forest](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-twilight-forest)

Ironwood

Fiery

Steeleaf

Knightmetal

 

[Vanilla Backport](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/vanillabackport)

Copper

 

[Winterly](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/winterly)

Cryomarble

 

All knives as of 2.1:

![knives](https://i.ibb.co/8zPxdqC/image-2022-08-17-164723137.png)

(Not including Twilight Forest, Adabranium, Advanced Netherite, Winterly, Mythic Metals' Tidesinger, Progression Reborn, End Reborn and Create Stuff & Additions)

  

**Credits:**

The Skeleton Appears for the Mythic Metals knife textures
